amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 51 — paragraph 1
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 51 — paragraph 1

## Text proposed by the Commission

Before placing on the market or putting into service a high-risk AI system referred to in Article 6(2), the provider or, where applicable, the authorised representative shall register that system in the EU database referred to in Article 60.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

Before placing on the market or putting into service a high-risk AI system referred to in Article 6(2) the provider or, where applicable, the authorised representative shall register that system in the EU database referred to in Article 60 , in accordance with Article 60(2);
commission_text: Before placing on the market or putting into service a high-risk AI system referred to in Article 6(2), the provider or, where applicable, the authorised representative shall register that system in the EU database referred to in Article 60.
parliament_text: Before placing on the market or putting into service a high-risk AI system referred to in Article 6(2) the provider or, where applicable, the authorised representative shall register that system in the EU database referred to in Article 60 , in accordance with Article 60(2);
